title: Dynamic Dates in Monday Doc
excerpt: Hi all! Loving the Dynamic Date availability, however two problems we’re seeing, if we are trying to list multiple dates, we only have “Today” as an option, additionally would be wonderful if we could change the date for…

posts.author: Rach12 (Rachael )
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all! Loving the Dynamic Date availability, however two problems we’re seeing, if we are trying to list multiple dates, we only have “Today” as an option, additionally would be wonderful if we could change the date format. Please see below snip how the Monday Doc date format differs from the Today dynamic value. We use Monday Docs for every item and this would be great to be able to add other dates or change the format. Thank you.

image739×210 10.4 KB
